title: Webhook moderation
description: Specifies how comments should be sent to a webhook.
$comment: Note: webhook moderation is useful taking custom actions.

url.title: Webhook URL
url.description: The comment will be in the request body.
url.$comment: TODO: when r3ply supports secrets allow secrets to be stored here.

method.title: Webhook method
method.description: The method the comment will be sent with.
